message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam shadowing false

actor "Organization Employee" as OE
participant ":CreateTaskUI" as UI
participant ":CreateTaskController" as C
participant "ApplicationPOT" as APOT
participant "app\n:ApplicationPOT" as APP
participant "session\n:UserSession" as SES
participant ":IPlatform" as IPLAT
participant "org\n:Organization" as ORG
participant "task\n:Task" as TASK
participant "cat\n:Category" as CAT
participant "lc\n:List<Category>" as LC

OE -> UI : 1 asks to create a new task
UI -> OE : 2 requests data (reference, designation, informal\ndescription, technical description, duration, cost)
OE -> UI : 3 types requested data

UI -> C : 4 lc=getTaskCategories()
activate C
C -> IPLAT : 5 lc=getTaskCategories()
activate IPLAT
deactivate IPLAT

UI -> OE : 6 shows task categories list and ask to select one
OE -> UI : 7 selects a task category

UI -> C : 8 createTask(ref,designation,informalDesc,technicalDesc,duration,cost,categoryId)
C -> IPLAT : 9 cat=getCategoryById(categoryId)
activate IPLAT
deactivate IPLAT

C -> APOT : 10 app = getInstance()
activate APOT
deactivate APOT

C -> APP : 11 session = getCurrentSession()
activate APP
deactivate APP

C -> SES : 12 email = getUserEmail()
activate SES
deactivate SES

C -> IPLAT : 13 org = getOrganizationByUserEmail(email)
activate IPLAT
deactivate IPLAT

C -> ORG : 14 task=createTask(ref,designation,informalDesc,technicalDesc,duration,cost,cat)
activate ORG
ORG -> TASK : 15 create(ref,designation,informalDesc,technicalDesc,duration,cost,cat)
activate TASK
deactivate TASK
ORG -> ORG : 16 validateTask(task)
deactivate ORG

C --> UI : 17 result
deactivate C

UI -> OE : 18 shows all data and requests confirmation
OE -> UI : 19 confirms the data

UI -> C : 20 saveTask()
activate C
C -> ORG : 21 saveTask(task)
activate ORG
ORG -> ORG : 22 validateTask(task)
ORG -> ORG : 23 addTask(task)
deactivate ORG

C --> UI : 24 result
deactivate C

UI -> OE : 25 informs operation success
@enduml
